content.intro: This guide walks you through adding your first property to PropertyGoose. Once added, you can link landlords, track compliance, and start managing tenancies.

steps.title: Navigate to Properties
steps.content: Click on 'Properties' in the sidebar navigation to open the properties list.

steps.title: Click Add Property
steps.content: Click the 'Add Property' button in the top right corner of the properties page.

steps.title: Enter the Address
steps.content: Start typing the property address. Our address lookup will suggest matching addresses. Select the correct one or enter manually if not found.

steps.title: Add Property Details
steps.content: Fill in the property type (house, flat, etc.), number of bedrooms, bathrooms, and any other relevant details.

steps.title: Save the Property
steps.content: Click 'Save Property' to add it to your portfolio. You can now link a landlord and add compliance documents.

sections.title: Pro Tip
sections.content: You can add multiple properties at once by clicking 'Add Another' after saving each property.

sections.title: Important
sections.content: Make sure to add compliance certificates (Gas Safety, EPC, EICR) to your property to receive expiry reminders.
